arts.ttl: Preview: Norwich City vs. Derby County - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Norwich City and Derby County, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne explains what caused deadline deals to fail as he issues Derby County transfer verdict
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Paul Warne revealed how two deadline day targets were pulled from Derby County's grasp after their parent clubs decided against the moves at the last minute.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne to assess free agents as trio feature on Derby County list
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. "I know there's always extenuating circumstances so I don't want the headline Warne says no to someone who hasn't played for six months and then I signed two of them.
